name: Christopher Nolan
message: Need an IMAX camera crew for an arctic expedition sequence.

name: Director Denis
message: Looking to shoot an anamorphic car commercial in the desert.

name: Elena Vance
message: We are looking to shoot our Autumn/Winter 2026 editorial film in Iceland. We love the moody, anamorphic lighting in 'Nocturne' and want a similar aesthetic for our campaign.
notes: VIP client. Follow up with producer regarding Iceland logistics.

name: Marcus Thorne
message: Need a high-velocity launch commercial for our new electric GT prototype. Requires high-speed tracking shots, arm-car rigging, and custom neon color grading similar to 'Velocity'.
notes: Requested treatment deck by Friday. Sent initial availability.

name: Siddharth Rao
message: Developing an independent sci-fi short film set in a brutalist observatory. Seeking a Director of Photography and full post-production color pipeline.
notes: Had discovery call on Zoom. Great script, sending budget proposal.

name: Chloe Bennett
message: Lead single video for artist's upcoming album. Fast-paced editing, anamorphic lenses, and heavy color contrast required. Shoot dates in late August in Bangladesh.
